name: Egg Topped Cauliflower
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the cauliflower of its large outer leaves, leaving only the small, tender leaves.
2. Cut a deep cross in the center of the stalk.
3. Bring salt and water to a boil in a 4-quart saucepan.
4. Add the cauliflower, with the stem down into the boiling liquid.
5. Simmer uncovered for 2 minutes, then cover and simmer until crisp tender, about 10 to 12 minutes.
6. Lift the cauliflower to a colander to drain well.
7. Transfer the cauliflower to a heated serving dish.
8. Pour hot butter over the top and sprinkle with chopped egg and parsley.
